dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Every school has its pecking order. A silent, brutal hierarchy that dictates who eats, who starves, and who gets to breathe without fear.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: For Kang Minho, Class 2-3, the bottom rung was a familiar, painful place.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: Another day. Another empty lunchbox. Another set of eyes looking through me, or worse, at me.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: Just get through it. Head down. Don't make eye contact. Don't exist.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jihun
dialogue.line: Well, well, if it isn't our resident ghost, Kang Minho.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Dojin
dialogue.line: Heard you got some new sneakers, Minho. Pretty flashy for someone who's supposed to be invisible.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: They're... they're old. My mom bought them.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jihun
dialogue.line: Mommy's boy, huh? Pathetic. You know the drill, Minho. Lunch money. Now.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: I... I don't have any today. I spent it on bus fare.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jihun
dialogue.line: Bus fare? What, are you too good to walk? You think you can just lie to me, Minho?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GRAB!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: Hey! Let go!

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jihun
dialogue.line: Check his pockets, Dojin. He's probably hiding it. Little rat.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Dojin
dialogue.line: Got it, Jihun. Let's see what treasures our little Minho is hoarding.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RIP!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: My... my textbook! You ripped it!

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jihun
dialogue.line: Oops. Guess you'll have to buy a new one. With what, though? Oh, right. Nothing.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: That's... that's my sister's textbook. She needs it.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jihun
dialogue.line: And that's my problem how? You should've just coughed up the cash. Now, about those sneakers...

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: No. Not the sneakers. My mom worked overtime for those.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jihun
dialogue.line: Oh? Suddenly you're brave? What are you gonna do, cry? Or are you gonna fight, Designated Bully?

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: Designated Bully... That's what they call me. The one everyone can pick on. The one who never fights back.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: But not today. Not for this.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GRIT!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: Get your hands off me.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jihun
dialogue.line: What was that, worm? Did you just talk back?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHOVE!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: I said, get your hands off me!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHAM!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Dojin
dialogue.line: Agh! My nose!

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jihun
dialogue.line: You little punk! You actually hit him!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: My sister's textbook. My mom's sneakers. You don't touch them.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: This feeling... it's been buried for so long. The adrenaline. The clarity. The urge to protect.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: They think I'm weak. They think I'm just a target. But they don't know what I used to be. What I *can* be.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jihun
dialogue.line: You're going to regret that, Minho! Get him, guys!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWING!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DUCK!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACK!

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Ugh!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: Too slow.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: KICK!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD!

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: My gut!

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jihun
dialogue.line: What the hell? Since when could you fight like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: You don't want to know.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: The fear is gone. Replaced by something cold and sharp. This is what it feels like to finally push back.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: PUNCH!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRASH!

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jihun
dialogue.line: Gah!

dialogue.speaker: Park Seulgi
dialogue.line: Minho...?

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: Silence.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Minho
dialogue.line: The 'Designated Bully' just found his designation.

summary: Kang Minho, the school's 'Designated Bully' and constant target of Lee Jihun's gang, reaches his breaking point when his sister's textbook is destroyed and his mother's gift is threatened. He snaps, revealing a surprising and brutal fighting ability that turns the tables on his tormentors.
